content:
<@259018461458595850> <@608850445024231424> 
Sorry for the confusion! I was never made aware that Traditional Chinese / TW would become a volunteer translation option. My repo is entirely unprepared for this, but I'll do my best to integrate that into my system in the coming days/weeks (I have a bit less time to work on this project than I used to, so hopefully you can be patient with me!)

In the mean time, you can find the TW column in the official Source Sheet:

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Z0qqXj6x6EPBsE-FyrZgsoHQ-Uvkg1TP/view?usp=drive_link
Sorry about this Mercy, should've made it more clear earlier

Also, our official GitHub repo is always available. <@&1481583668140179558> <@259018461458595850> <@608850445024231424> 如有繁中文本的修正上傳，可以上傳到官方github repo的繁中文件夾~ https://github.com/BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations/tree/main/TRANSLATIONS/01_UPLOAD_YOUR_CONTRIBUTIONS

embeds.title: Morimens-Localizations/TRANSLATIONS/01_UPLOAD_YOUR_CONTRIBUTIONS at...
embeds.description: Contribute to BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations development by creating an account on GitHub.

content: <@1376763322568937562> 如果要做繁中文本校對，有現有的官方繁中文本可以查看嗎？

Hi Keepers, 

Starting from March 2026,

We will include your volunteer contribution in the in-game update notes!
You can directly find them, including info on who translated/proofread what, in our game client, along with other update info.

We will still continue to update the contribution list monthly in this server & in the Morimens main server. 

Thank you for your help as always!

各位守密人，

自2026年3月起，

我們將把各位的志願貢獻納入遊戲內的更新日誌中！
包括誰翻譯或校對了哪些內容，皆可直接在遊戲客戶端內與其他更新資訊一同查閱。

我們仍將持續每月在本伺服器及Morimens主伺服器中更新貢獻名單。

一如既往，感謝各位的協助！
請問要如何取得TC身分組？

您好，可以在<#1402537664619479102> 透過react獲取身份組
我已經為您手動添加了身份組，現在應該可以看到TC專屬的頻道了！
Hi, I was looking over Kathigu-Ra's Psyche Deepdive and saw that both "Big Sis" and "Kath" are used to translate 大姐. Is one preferred over the other, or does it depend on context?
generally speaking it's more contextual since title addresses are somewhat less common in english
it should basically be whichever fits better
